chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR 1st Civil Appeal No.D- 23 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 10-08-2023 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for Appellant. ***** Learned counsel for the appellant, under instructions, does not press the instant 1st Civil Appeal as the appellant intends to file a fresh appeal with certain documents. Accordingly, the appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s) in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
